label: 2662 Definitions
notes: References in Text, as in effect before enactment of the Improving America’s Schools Act of 1994, referred to in par. (1)(C), means , Education, prior to its repeal by , , .Section 241 of title 20section 241 of Title 20Pub. L. 103–382, title III, § 331(b)108 Stat. 3965Oct. 20, 1994

L. 103–382, § 391(c)(4)(A)section 8801 of title 20Par. (1)(C). directed two separate amendments of par. (1)(C), the first, by , directed the insertion of “or successor authority” immediately after “”, the second, by , directed the insertion (without reference to the first amendment) of “as in effect before enactment of the Improving America’s Schools Act of 1994” immediately after “,”. Literal execution of the second amendment was not possible, as “,” was amended to read “ or successor authority,” by the first amendment. Commas were editorially inserted before and after the phrase added by the second amendment and it was inserted immediately after “” to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. children.label: A
children.text: any local educational agency as defined in ;section 7801 of title 20

children.label: B
children.text: the owner of any nonprofit elementary or secondary school building; and

children.label: C
children.text: the governing authority of any school operated pursuant to , as in effect before enactment of the Improving America’s Schools Act of 1994, or successor authority, relating to impact aid for children who reside on Federal property.section 241 of title 20
The term “nonprofit elementary or secondary school” has the meaning given such term by section 2642(8) of this title.1So in original. Probably should be section “2642(9)”.1
The term “radon” means the radioactive gaseous element and its short-lived decay products produced by the disintegration of the element radium occurring in air, water, soil, or other media.
The term “school building” has the meaning given such term by .section 2642(13) of this title
